design: full 2x2 grid at 5 prompts/cell under the REPAIRED (directive-gated) policy; one nohook_informed timeout
conclusion: with the hook the harness behaves correctly on 10/10 sessions (always intervene on blind, never on informed); without it 4/9 (unreliable blind delivery, recurring informed over-triggering). The hook's injected verdict is the source of both reliability and selectivity under the repaired policy.
